subcodes.first_line: His beloved Countenance unveiled, His praiseworthy Face manifest and visible, that the mirrors of contingent being might emerge from the hidden realm of existence into the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وجهه محبوب مکشوف و طلعه محمود عری و مشهود تا مرایای امکان از غیب هستی بعالم
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
